'''Danthe Artifice, Ltd.''' was a designed of [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Personality matrix/Legends|personality matrixes]]<ref name="ITCW" /> based on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core World]] of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]].<ref name="FOP" /> It was a major subcontractor for [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] and developed most of the company's droid interface systems. They also had a profitable subdivision offering third-party personas directly to consumers.<ref name="ITCW" />

==Appearances==
*[[Darth Plagueis (novel)|''Darth Plagueis'']] {{Ab|Darth Plagueis (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
